chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.Transfer.Appl.No.S- 40 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 10.05.2019. Mr. Nazar Muhammad Memon, Additional Prosecutor General. = An application by applicant Ali Akbar son of Karam Ali whose son namely Sajid Ali alias Bablo is facing trial in Crime No.141/2018 u/s 324, 353, 34 PPC of P.S Tando Jam, was received through post complaining that his son is in jail but above case is not making any progress as the trial Court is lying vacant. Comments on this application were called from the learned Sessions Judge, Hyderabad, who vide a letter dated 06.05.2019 has forwarded comments of Incharge 7th Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad where the case is pending, disclosing that after framing of charge, examination in chief of complainant ASI Asad Nawaz, Mashir PC Ahmed Ali and I.O ASI Muhammad has been recorded however their cross examination was reserved on the request of learned defence counsel and as the trial Court is lying vacant since 20th March, 2019, no further progress has been made. In view of such position, the application was converted into transfer application and office was directed to post the same in Court after notice to all concerned. Today, learned Additional Prosecutor General has appeared and has extended no objection for transfer of the case to any other Court for further progress. Accordingly, this application is allowed. The Sessions Case arising out of Crime No.141/2018 u/s 324, 353, 34 PPC of P.S Tando Jam pending on the file of learned 7th Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad is hereby withdrawn and assigned to the learned Sessions Judge, Hyderabad with direction to either himself proceed with the same and conclude it preferably within a period of two months or assign it to any other learned Additional Sessions Judge for disposal in accordance with law in the terms of above directions.

Accordingly, this application is allowed. The Sessions Case arising out of Crime No.141/2018 u/s 324, 353, 34 PPC of P.S Tando Jam pending on the file of learned 7th Additional Sessions Judge, Hyderabad is hereby withdrawn and assigned to the learned Sessions Judge, Hyderabad with direction to either himself proceed with the same and conclude it preferably within a period of two months or assign it to any other learned Additional Sessions Judge for disposal in accordance with law in the terms of above directions. JUDGE Tufail/PA
